# .github

GitHub automation config root: Dependabot keeps workflow action pins current; `workflows/` runs NUR package builds, Cachix caching, and daily upstream version tracking.

## Contents

- [dependabot.yml](./dependabot.yml) — Schema v2. Single `github-actions` ecosystem entry, root `/`, weekly schedule. Monitors `.github/workflows/*.yml` action refs only — no npm/pip/cargo.

## Subdirectories

- [workflows/](./workflows/) — Two-workflow CI/CD suite: `build.yml` builds NUR packages against 4 nixpkgs channels and pushes to Cachix; `auto-update-packages.yml` fetches upstream releases/commits daily, patches `pkgs/*/default.nix`, and opens auto-squash PRs.

## Configuration

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| `version` | `2` |
| `package-ecosystem` | `github-actions` |
| `directory` | `/` |
| `schedule.interval` | `weekly` |

Dependabot scope limited to action version pins. Package ecosystems (`nix`, `pip`, `cargo`) not configured — upstream Nix package updates handled by `auto-update-packages.yml` instead.
